goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should 'arrive by 11:45'.
The train should leave on 'sunday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should arrive by 11:45
The train should leave on sunday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
